Bus Timings

RTA Dubai Express Bus Routes: Find Your Fastest Travel Options

August 1, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai’s extensive public transportation system, managed by the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA), is designed to accommodate a large number of commuters every day. The RTA Dubai buses are a crucial part of this system, with a fleet of 1,518 buses operating across the Emirate. This article explores the Express Bus Routes provided by RTA Dubai, offering you efficient travel options to navigate the city.

Express Bus Routes

Bus ID From To
13B Gold Souq Bus Station Al Qusais Bus Station
91A Gold Souq Bus Station Jebel Ali Bus Station
X02 Union MS Al Satwa
X13 LuLu Village Al Satwa Bus Station
X22 Al Qusais Industrial Area 2 Business Bay MS
X23 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station International City
X25 Al Karama Bus Station Silicon Oasis HQ
X28 LuLu Village Dubai Internet City MS
X64 Al Baraha Bus Station Ras Al Khor
X92 Al Ghubaiba Bus Station Dubai Investment Park
X94 Gold Souq Bus Station Dubai Investment Park

These routes are designed for quick and efficient travel, reducing the time spent in transit and helping you reach your destination swiftly.

Dubai Bus Fares

Dubai is divided into seven fare zones. The cost of a bus ride depends on the number of zones traveled. Passengers can transfer between buses, metros, trams, and water buses within different zones. Transfers must occur within 30 minutes to be counted as a single trip; otherwise, two separate fares apply.

Fare Structure:

Card Type Fare within 1 Zone Fare for 2 Adjacent Zones Fare for More than 2 Zones
Silver Card AED 3 AED 5 AED 7.5
Gold Card AED 6 AED 10 AED 15
Blue Personal Card AED 3 AED 5 AED 7.5
Red Card (Ticket) AED 4 AED 6 AED 8.5

Discounts: Students, social affairs beneficiaries, senior citizens, and residents with Blue Personal Cards receive up to 50% off. Travel within the city and nearby areas is free for People of Determination and children aged 5 years or under.

Penalties: Using invalid or expired NOL cards, not providing a NOL card upon request, or using a card designated to someone else results in fines. Passengers using fake NOL cards face a fine of AED 500.

Facilities on RTA Dubai Buses

RTA buses and stations are equipped with numerous facilities for commuter convenience:

  • Air-Conditioned Stations and Buses: Ensuring comfort in Dubai’s hot climate.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Information Screens: Displaying route and stop information.
  • Alert Sounds and Flashlight Signals: Assisting passengers with hearing impairments.
  • Dedicated Spaces: For People of Determination and separate sections for females and children.
  • Vending Machines and Cafeterias: Available at main bus stops.
  • NOL Top-Up Machines: Located at major bus stops.
  • Bicycle Parking and Taxi Services: Available at main stations.
  • E-Card Machines: For easy card management.

General Guidelines

  • Reserved seating behind the driver is for ladies and children.

  • Eating, drinking, smoking, spitting, and littering are prohibited.
  • Animals and heavy luggage are not allowed.
  • Noise and musical instruments are not permitted on the bus.

Contact Information for RTA Dubai

For assistance, you can reach RTA Dubai through various channels:

  • Email: ASK@rta. ae

  • Phone: 800-90-90
  • Website: RTA Dubai Official Website
  • Customer Happiness Centres: Located in Deira, Al Aweer, Al Kifaf, Umm Ramool, Al Twar, Al Barsha, and Al Manarah.

Comparison of RTA Dubai Bus Route Types

Bus Route Type Purpose Coverage Area Key Characteristics
RTA Dubai Express Bus Routes Fast and direct connections to major destinations Major hubs and key locations within Dubai Fewer stops; faster travel time; prefixed with “E”
RTA Dubai Feeder Bus Routes Connects residential areas to main metro stations Residential neighborhoods and metro stations Smaller, local routes feeding into larger transport systems
RTA Urban CBD Bus Routes Serves the Central Business District (CBD) Central business areas of Dubai High frequency; caters to office commuters
RTA Urban Bus Routes General city transportation Various city areas across Dubai Extensive network; connects different neighborhoods and commercial areas
RTA Intercity Routes Links Dubai to neighboring cities Routes to cities like Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, etc. Longer routes; prefixed with “E” for intercity travel

By familiarizing yourself with these routes and facilities, you can make the most of Dubai’s public transport system, ensuring a smooth and efficient travel experience. Embracing the express bus routes will save you time and streamline your commutes across the city. With the added convenience of modern amenities and clear information, navigating Dubai has never been easier.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 1, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
